'''Jovan III''', often called simply '''Jovan''',<ref name="YDRV">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref><ref name="GatORW" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Jovan system/Legends|Jovan system]] and was noted for the [[Jovan Station]], built in orbit around the planet.<ref name="TEA" />

Jovan III was a fertile [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and one of the premier [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] of the Gordian Reach. It was crisscrossed by [[Harvester droid/Legends|robo-harvesters]] and dotted with agricultural research labs.<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] converted the Jovan Station as the headquarters of the [[Yavin blockade|Blockade of Yavin]]. This seriously affected the commerce of the planet and the entire [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="TEA" />
